reviews.review_description: I love this. You become the drummer in a beautiful world. When I am playing this I feel like I am part of the music. The real world doesn’t exist. Thank you to the developers for making this beautiful music experience. 😊🎶🪘
Decent visuals, good concept and audio. But the lack of controller support takes me out of the experience. Need some sort of haptic feedback.

Probably doing something wrong but I have to look down to the drum to be able to see the rythm, which results in not seeing anything of the visuals going on in the meantime. Not sure if I understand this game...
